svg.text: Roborock S8 MaxV Ultra
Source-backed long detail fixture
Official source
https://us.roborock.com/products/roborock-s8-maxv-ultra
Observed price band
US page showed $799.99 sale price and $1,799.99 original price during source capture.
Top priority selling points
P1: 8-in-1 RockDock Ultra with hot-water mop washing and heated-air drying.
P2: 10000Pa extreme suction, VibraRise 3.0 mopping and liftable brush/mop.
P3: FlexiArm side brush, extra edge mopping and Reactive AI obstacle recognition.
Parameter evidence
Category: robot vacuum and mop
Navigation: PreciSense LiDAR navigation plus Reactive AI 2.0 obstacle recognition
Base station: auto detergent, auto dust emptying, self-refilling and self-cleaning
App and voice: Roborock SmartPlan and Hello Rocky voice assistant
Connectivity: official page notes 2.4GHz Wi-Fi only
Expected extraction checks
Brand should be Roborock, model should be S8 MaxV Ultra.
AI should preserve evidence for suction, dock, hot wash, obstacle avoidance and edge cleaning.
Low-confidence currency conversion from USD to CNY should be flagged for manual review.
